auditor_address: 1200 Veterans Memorial Hwy., Suite 350, Hauppauge, New York 11788

cash_equivalents.definition: Time deposits, CDs, and highly liquid debt instruments with original maturities ≤3 months

use_of_estimates.description: Management estimates and assumptions affect reported amounts of assets, liabilities, and contingent disclosures. Actual results could differ.

income_taxes.status: Pass-through entity — not subject to income tax
income_taxes.2022_2023: Multi-member LLC operating as partnership; income/loss taxed directly to partners
income_taxes.2024: Single-member LLC (100% owned by Ivan Ramen Holdings Co. LLC since 1/1/2024); income/loss passes through to parent

revenue_recognition.standard: ASC Topic 606, Revenue from Contracts with Customers
revenue_recognition.initial_franchise_fees: Recognized on straight-line basis over term of franchise agreement (performance obligation = right to access IP)

pre_opening_activities.brand_specific: Single performance obligation with IP access right; recognized over FA term per ASU 2021-02
pre_opening_activities.non_brand_specific: Separate distinct performance obligation; recognized ratably as services rendered

revenue_recognition.multi_unit_fees: Deferred and apportioned to each FA signed; recognized same as initial fees
revenue_recognition.royalties: Sales-based; recognized as franchisee sales occur and royalty deemed collectible

system_brand_fund.excess_over_expenses: Advertising costs accrued up to amount of marketing fund revenues

revenue_recognition.incremental_costs: Direct/incremental costs (commissions) capitalized and amortized over FA term

depreciation_amortization.status: Not applicable — no depreciable assets on balance sheet
depreciation_amortization.organization_costs: Previously capitalized at $6,770; reclassified as prior period adjustment in 2024

impairment.status: Not disclosed — no long-lived assets to impair

lease_accounting.status: Not applicable — no leases disclosed in financial statements
lease_accounting.notes: Franchisor's principal address is listed but no lease obligation is on the balance sheet

advertising_fund_accounting.status: System Brand Fund not yet established
advertising_fund_accounting.planned_treatment: Franchisor acts as principal; revenues/expenses recognized on gross basis

note1_organization.formation: July 12, 2021 (stated as DE LLC in notes; Item 1 says NY LLC — discrepancy)
note1_organization.purpose: Sell franchises under Ivan Ramen name and system
note1_organization.ownership_change: 100% transferred to Ivan Ramen Holdings Co. LLC effective January 1, 2024

fy2024.reason: Incorrectly capitalized organization costs reclassified against retained earnings

fy2023.reason: Prior period adjustment (nature not specified in 2023 notes)

note4_concentration_credit_risk.description: Cash may exceed FDIC insurance limits; placed with major financial institution

ip_license.continuing_fee: 10% of prior fiscal year's gross revenues
ip_license.floor_provision: Reduced to maintain $100K net income floor
ip_license.modifiable: Licensor and Licensee may agree to waive/modify at any time

note5_related_party_transactions.notes: In 2024, franchisor repaid funds borrowed from Ivan Ramen USA LLC and then lent funds to them — the relationship reversed from debtor to creditor.

uk_license.continuing_fee: 5% of prior fiscal year's proceeds less onboarding fee

las_vegas_franchise.counterparty: Unrelated entity (identified as Venetian Las Vegas Gaming LLC in Exhibit F)

events.description: $120,000 capital contribution by one of the owners
